text_block_list.text:
And so, just like thatпҪһвҖҰвҖҰ 
I applied to transfer to Team <Ascella>!

Wait wait, isn't your response kinda weirdпҪһпҪһпҪһ!?

text_block_list.text: Did you reallyвҖҰвҖҰ?

text_block_list.text:
ReallyпҪһпҪһпҪһ!! Proгғ»perгғ»ly! I watched her race, talked about it,

I'm pretty sure we're the same age, aren't we?

text_block_list.text: Hm? Well, yeah butвҖҰвҖҰit's fine! No biggieвҷЎ

text_block_list.text: вҖҰвҖҰseems like this conversation is going off the rails.

text_block_list.text: Huh!? Oh, yeah. What's up?

text_block_list.text:

вҖҰвҖҰyou were probably thinking about Pandora-san, right?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I thought so. 
вҖҰвҖҰThese past few days, I've just been watching butвҖ”вҖ”

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: To put it bluntly, that girl is reaaaaally hard to handle!

(I'd heard about it from her previous trainer, but she certainly was 
incredibly talented. Even her teammates evaluated her very highly)

(I'd heard about it from her previous trainer, but she certainly was 
incredibly talented. Even her teammates evaluated her very highly)

(It wasn't like she was lacking motivation or slacking offвҖҰвҖҰ 
Rather, she seemed to always be incredibly positive and having fun)

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
Huu, huu, huuвҖҰвҖҰ!! 
Here I gooooooгғјгғјгғјгғјгғј!!

text_block_list.name: Antenna-haired Trainee
text_block_list.text: Howaah!?

text_block_list.name: Single Knot Trainee
text_block_list.text: Amazing accelerationвҖҰвҖҰ!

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text: GoalвҷЎ Howzzat!? How's my time!?

text_block_list.name: Antenna-haired Trainee
text_block_list.text:
WahпҪһвҖҰвҖҰYou cleared your target time easilyпҪһ. 
And it was a pretty high level target line too, awesomeпҪһвҖҰвҖҰ

text_block_list.name: Single Knot Trainee
text_block_list.text:
Pandora, that's crazyвҖҰвҖҰ! These past 3 days, I've been challenging 
myself to clear that time, but you crushed it in one dayвҖҰвҖҰ!

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
For real? For really realпҪһ? I really am a genius, aren't I!? 
Knew itпҪһпҪһпҪһ!

text_block_list.name: Fusaichi Pandora
text_block_list.text:
EheheпҪһ, since I've cleared my goal, I'm calling it a day! 
Good work out thereпҪһвҷӘ

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well, I suppose she's working hard. In her own way. 
вҖҰвҖҰBut, she doesn't seem гҖҺSeriousгҖҸ

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
For most things she's encountered, it was probably 
enough to get by relying solely on her own talentвҖҰвҖҰ 
So she probably never had to get serious or desperate.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But the racing world is not so forgiving that you 
would be able to continue like that. вҖ”вҖ”Her гҖҺOka ShoгҖҸ 
results were pretty disastrous, weren't they?

Yeah. That's why, at the гҖҺOaksгҖҸ I want to help her get her revenge.

Yeah. That's why, at the гҖҺOaksгҖҸ I want to help her get her revenge.

text_block_list.text:
Right. вҖҰвҖҰThen you'll just have to keep racking your brain. 
Just like you always do.
вҖҰвҖҰiiiiiiпҪһпҪһвҖҰвҖҰnnвҖҰвҖҰsaaaaaaaaaвҖҰвҖҰnвҖ”вҖ”

text_block_list.text: вҖҰвҖҰThat voice, don't tell meвҖ”вҖ”
KING-SAAAA-NN!
I'm soooooo sorrrrrrrrryгғјгғјгғј!!

The door, the wall, and everything that got sent flying! 
I'll put it all back to normal soвҖҰвҖҰ!!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe this, as usual you don't even know your own strengthвҖҰвҖҰ 
This late at night, what's wrong? вҖ”вҖ”Kawakami Princess-san.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
And youвҖҰвҖҰnow that I get a good look, you're covered in dirt, 
aren't you? вҖҰвҖҰWere you training? Until this late?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Gya!! I-I apologize for being such a dusty Princess! But, I just 
had toвҖ”вҖ”King-san, I had something I needed to tell you immediately!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
From the first moment I saw you. How you were more 
noble, and stronger than anyone, shining with the 
brilliance befitting of being called first-rateвҖ”вҖ”

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
How, within me, you instilled a dream that would never falter. 
To the King-san I admire! I just had to tell you as soon as possibleвҖ”вҖ”!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
King-san! I wasn't able to make it in time for the 
гҖҺOka ShoгҖҸ butвҖҰвҖҰI will be able to participate in the гҖҺOaksгҖҸ

(! вҖҰвҖҰin Pandora's next race, the гҖҺOaksгҖҸ, 
Kawakami Princess is also going to be competingвҖҰвҖҰ!?)

(! вҖҰвҖҰin Pandora's next race, the гҖҺOaksгҖҸ, 
Kawakami Princess is also going to be competingвҖҰвҖҰ!?)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
King-san. Since my debut, I've been able to make 
it here while remaining undefeated. вҖ”вҖ”My admiration 
for you is why I was able to do my best!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I won't be someone else's copy. 
Because гҖҺBeing yourselfгҖҸ is fundamental to being a Princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That's why, even while on a different team, using a different route! 
I'll still carry with me the nobility and strength that you taught meвҖ”вҖ”

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I'll become the greaaaaaaaaatest PrincessпҪһпҪһпҪһ!!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: вҖҰвҖҰвҖҰвҖҰI see.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Very well, just continue to run like that. 
On your own path, with your own feet.

text_block_list.text:
вҖҰвҖҰand she came in like a storm, but now she's

text_block_list.text: Eh!? You want me to act as Pandora-san's mentorвҖҰвҖҰ!?

maybe Pandora would be more willing to hear them out.
